The slowest metabolism of any fish

questions.q: In what year did Canberra officially replace Sydney as the capital city of Australia?
How long does sunlight take to travel from the Sun's surface to Earth's atmosphere?
Which human body part is incapable of self-repair and cannot regenerate once damaged?
How many bones comprise the adult human skeleton?

Which Renaissance artist and polymath created 'The Mona Lisa' and filled thousands of notebook pages with mirror writing and anatomical sketches?

choices: Brussels, Belgium and the European Union
Strasbourg, France and the European Parliament

3 minutes from Westray to Papa Westray
2 minutes from Santa Monica to Long Beach

choices: Teeth are technically not part of the skeleton
